title: Ghoulish Waterpark
lines: You emerge from a slime-covered pipe into the ruins of 'Splash Mountain'—or what's left of it.
The pools are filled with a thick, neon-green sludge that glows with a sickly intensity. Abandoned tubes and slides lay scattered like the skeletons of giant snakes.
The sound of rhythmic, wet slapping comes from the base of the log flume ride.

options.desc: 1. Climb the rickety stairs to the top of the log flume
2. Hide inside a large, discarded donut float
3. Crawl back into the safety of the sewer pipe
